channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (June 28)
item.description: Jane Pauley hosts a special program celebrating the nation's semiquincentennial, "These United States - America at 250."

item.title: Touring Trump's Washington: How the president is shaping the nation's capital
item.description: America marks its 250th year, and Washington, D.C., is undergoing major changes under President Donald Trump.

item.title: Former Indiana governor explains how his nonprofit will help workers affected by AI boom
item.description: RAISE US, a nonprofit, launched a fund to ease the transition for workers impacted by AI. Former Indiana Gov. Eric Holcomb, a co-chair...

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes live updates: Death toll rises to at least 920, official says
item.description: Two powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela on Wednesday evening.
